channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Exploration Company : l'entreprise française qui construit un vaisseau spatial, et maintenant aussi des fusées
item.description: Connue pour son projet de capsule spatiale « Nyx », l'entreprise franco-allemande The Exploration Company se lance également dans le secteur des lanceurs lourds réutilisables. Un pari ambitieux qui reposerait sur un nouveau type de moteur, et dont les détails seront révélés plus tard.

item.title: How to watch Argentina vs Cape Verde: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as Lionel Messi faces FIFA World Cup 2026 upstarts
item.description: Here's how to watch Argentina vs Cape Verde for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, as the Blue Sharks aim to shock the holders.

item.title: This tiny dongle lets you take over an iPhone remotely from your Windows browser, and it costs only $89
item.description: The Comet Q uses hardware-level remote access to control phones, tablets, and laptops directly through browsers and USB-C.

item.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
item.description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

item.title: Are stores open on July 4? Costco, banks, USPS, Walmart, pharmacies, more on Independence Day 2026
item.description: What’s actually open on July 4? Here’s what you need to know before you head out While everyone knows that July 4 is a federal holiday, this year that holiday was officially observed yesterday, on July 3. That’s because today, July 4, 2026, falls on a Saturday, when most federal offices are closed anyway.

item.title: International Google Pixels are different than American models - here's how
item.description: In case you were wondering in which country you should buy a Pixel phone, you world traveler you.

item.title: The government just launched Trump Accounts. Here’s who gets the free $1,000
item.description: Parents can now open a Trump Account online, but only certain children qualify for the government’s $1,000 contribution. This weekend, the Trump administration is planning to roll out one of its most ambitious programs yet: Trump Accounts. Tied to America’s 250th birthday, the program is set to launch on July 4, giving around 1.5 million American babies $1,000 to help their future financial independence. ...

item.title: The Dune keypad device can be your meeting controller and more
item.description: The $149 Dune keyboard can be a meeting controller at least and a script-executing keypad at best.

item.title: This $550 Dell 15 Laptop beats those cheap 4GB laptop deals — with 16GB RAM and Core i5 power, it's a better buy for back-to-school and office work
item.description: Dell 15 Laptop delivers solid everyday performance for studying and remote work and it's currently priced at under $550.

item.title: Dell 27 Plus QHD USB-C S2725DC review: A perfect budget business monitor for every kind of office
item.description: A simple business monitor that's simply perfect in most professional contexts.

item.title: 3 Nuclear Startups Hit a Big Milestone. Why It Matters—and Why It Doesn’t
item.description: The companies’ Fourth of July plans include celebrating new reactor designs coming online. But there’s still a long way to go before they deliver energy at a meaningful scale.

item.title: I'm a tech journalist, and these are the top 5 business travel gadgets I never leave home without
item.description: I travel a lot for work, and these are the top five gadgets I always take with me to make sure I stay productive wherever I am.
